results.title: Teacher State Certification Support
results.description_text:
United Independent School District (UISD) is seeking proposals from TEA-accredited vendors to provide Educator Preparation Programs for teachers seeking state certification. To ensure high-quality preparation, only vendors maintaining a 90% passing rate or better in compliance with Texas Administrative Code (TAC) will be considered.
 
The district intends to partner with a vendor offering a hybrid of online certification and test prep courses to provide personalized support across all required content areas. This is an all-or-none proposal; vendors must submit a comprehensive proposal meeting all specifications to be eligible for evaluation.
results.ai_summary:
Background
 The United Independent School District (UISD) is seeking proposals from Texas Education Agency (TEA) accredited vendors to provide comprehensive Educator Preparation Programs for teachers pursuing state certification. The goal of this initiative is to assist teachers who have not yet passed their Texas Certification Examinations by partnering with a vendor that offers a combination of online certification programs and test preparation courses. Only vendors with a proven 90% passing rate or better will be considered, ensuring high-quality teacher preparation.

Work Details
 The selected vendor will provide the following services: 
- **Hybrid Courses**: Personalized support in areas including Bilingual (164), Core Subjects (391), ESL (154), PPR (160), Special Education Specialist EC-12, BTLPT (190), STR (293), and future adaptability for any new tests. 
- **Instructional Support**: Research-based strategies and test preparation assistance for teachers. 
- **Wellness Strategies**: Psychological strategies to reduce test anxiety and build confidence. 
- **Blended Learning**: A mix of synchronous and asynchronous sessions. 
- **Platform Management**: Creation and management of a Google Classroom platform for material distribution and feedback. 
- **Accountability**: Ongoing documentation of teacher progress, compliance, attendance, and grades reporting to UISD. 
- **Face-to-Face Sessions**: At least three face-to-face sessions annually, with schedules based on district needs.

Period of Performance
 The program is intended for implementation during the 2026-2027 school year, with an option to renew annually for two additional years.

Place of Performance
 Services will be performed within the United Independent School District located in Laredo, Texas.

Bidder Requirements
 Vendors must meet the following requirements: 
- Maintain a 90% passing rate or better as per TEA standards. 
- Compliance with all Texas Administrative Code (TAC) requirements. 
- Submission of official TEA Accountability System for Educator Preparation data from the last three academic years. 
- This is an all-or-none proposal; vendors must fulfill the entire scope of work to be evaluated.
